rawAssistant: Fresh signs on the side road, you say? Well, it's not every day we get a mystery to solve here in Hollowfen. I've seen some travelers come through with tales of strange markings and eerie lights, but nothing that's ever piqued my interest like this. Still, it's always good to keep an ear to the ground – or rather, an eye on the road. I've got a few of my own supplies that might be just what you need for whatever is out there. Road kits, potions... and of course, some cures for any unexpected scrapes you might get into. What can I show you?
